## Description

Briefly explain what this PR changes and why. Include links to related issues.

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] chore/refactor/build

## Checklist
- [ ] Self-reviewed and updated relevant docs (`AGENTS.md`, comments)
- [ ] Lint clean or unaffected (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests updated/added where relevant (`npm test`)
- [ ] Screenshots for UI changes

## Notes
Add any migration steps, environment variables, or special deployment notes.
